slice.description: Zustand store slice for combined stores

patterns.name: Store definition
patterns.pattern: const useStore = create<State>()(set => ({ count: 0, inc: () => set(s => ({ count: s.count + 1 })) }))

setup.description: Use Immer for immutable state updates

questions.topic: how do I create a store
questions.answer: Call create() with a function that receives set (and optionally get) and returns your initial state and actions.

steps.code: export const useStore = create<State>()(set => ({ count: 0, inc: () => set(s => ({ count: s.count + 1 })) }))

questions.answer: Wrap your store creator with the persist middleware to save state to localStorage (or any storage).
